metadata.note: Comprehensive extraction of ALL Telegram Bot API methods from official documentation

Getting Updates.description: Methods for receiving updates from Telegram servers

methods.description: Use this method to remove webhook integration if you decide to switch back to getUpdates. Returns True on success.

params.name: drop_pending_updates
params.description: Pass True to drop all pending updates

methods.description: Use this method to receive incoming updates using long polling. Returns an Array of Update objects.

params.name: offset
params.description: Identifier of the first update to be returned

params.name: limit
params.description: Limits the number of updates to be retrieved (1-100)

params.name: timeout
params.description: Timeout in seconds for long polling

params.name: allowed_updates
params.description: List of the update types you want your bot to receive

methods.description: Use this method to get current webhook status. Requires no parameters. On success, returns a WebhookInfo object.
Use this method to specify a URL and receive incoming updates via an outgoing webhook. Returns True on success.

params.name: url
params.description: HTTPS URL to send updates to

params.name: certificate
params.description: Upload your public key certificate

params.name: ip_address
params.description: The fixed IP address which will be used to send webhook requests

params.name: max_connections
params.description: Maximum allowed number of simultaneous HTTPS connections

params.name: allowed_updates
params.description: List of the update types you want your bot to receive

params.name: drop_pending_updates
params.description: Pass True to drop all pending updates

params.name: secret_token
params.description: Secret token for verification of webhook requests

methods.description: Use this method to close the bot instance before moving it from one local server to another. Returns True on success.
A simple method for testing your bot's authentication token. Returns basic information about the bot in form of a User object.
Use this method to log out from the cloud Bot API server before launching the bot locally. Returns True on success.

Messages.description: Methods for sending and managing messages

methods.description: Use this method to copy messages of any kind. Returns the MessageId of the sent message on success.
Use this method to copy messages of any kind. If some of the specified messages can't be found or copied, they are skipped.
Use this method to remove up to 10000 recent reactions in a chat.
Use this method to delete a message, including service messages. Returns True on success.
Use this method to remove a reaction from a message.
Use this method to delete multiple messages simultaneously.
Use this method to edit captions of messages. Returns the edited Message.
Use this method to edit animation, audio, document, live photo, photo, or video messages.
Use this method to edit only the reply markup of messages.
Use this method to edit text, rich and game messages. Returns the edited Message.
Use this method to forward messages of any kind. Returns the MessageId of the sent message on success.
Use this method to forward multiple messages of any kind.
Use this method to send text messages. Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to stream a partial message to a user while the bot is still composing.
Use this method to change the chosen reactions on a message.
Use this method to edit live location messages. Returns the edited Message.
Use this method to send animation files (GIF or H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound). Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to send audio files, if you want Telegram clients to display them in the music player. Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to send general files. Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to send live photos. Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to send a group of photos, live photos, videos, animations or audios. Returns an array of Messages.
Use this method to send paid media. Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to send photos. Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to send video files. Returns the sent Message.
As of v.4.0, Telegram clients support rounded square MPEG4 videos. Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to send audio files, if you want Telegram clients to treat them as voice messages. Returns the sent Message.
Use this method to stop updating a live location message before live_period expires.
Use this method to send point on the map. On success, the sent Message is returned.

params.name: business_connection_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message will be sent

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot, supergroup or channel in the format @username

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of a forum; for forum supergroups and private chats of bots with forum topic mode enabled only

params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude of the location

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude of the location

params.name: horizontal_accuracy
params.description: The radius of uncertainty for the location, measured in meters; 0-1500

params.name: live_period
params.description: Period in seconds during which the location will be updated; should be between 60 and 86400

params.name: heading
params.description: For live locations, a direction in which the user is moving, in degrees. Must be between 1 and 360 if specified.

params.name: proximity_alert_radius
params.description: For live locations, a maximum distance for proximity alerts about approaching another chat member, in meters. Must be between 1 and 100000 if specified.

params.name: disable_notification
params.description: Sends the message silently. Users will receive a notification with no sound.

params.name: protect_content
params.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

params.name: reply_parameters
params.description: Description of the message to reply to

params.name: reply_markup
params.type: InlineKeyboardMarkup or ReplyKeyboardMarkup or ReplyKeyboardRemove or ForceReply
params.description: Additional interface options

methods.description: Use this method to send information about a venue. On success, the sent Message is returned.

params.name: business_connection_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message will be sent

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot, supergroup or channel in the format @username

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of a forum

params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude of the venue

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude of the venue

params.name: title
params.description: Name of the venue

params.name: address
params.description: Address of the venue

params.name: foursquare_id
params.description: Foursquare identifier of the venue

params.name: foursquare_type
params.description: Foursquare type of the venue, if known

params.name: google_place_id
params.description: Google Places identifier of the venue

params.name: google_place_type
params.description: Google Places type of the venue

params.name: disable_notification
params.description: Sends the message silently

params.name: protect_content
params.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

params.name: reply_parameters
params.description: Description of the message to reply to

params.name: reply_markup
params.type: InlineKeyboardMarkup or ReplyKeyboardMarkup or ReplyKeyboardRemove or ForceReply
params.description: Additional interface options

methods.description: Use this method to send a game. On success, the sent Message is returned.

params.name: business_connection_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message will be sent

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot in the format @username

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of a forum

params.name: game_short_name
params.description: Short name of the game, serves as the unique identifier for the game

params.name: disable_notification
params.description: Sends the message silently

params.name: protect_content
params.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

params.name: reply_parameters
params.description: Description of the message to reply to

params.name: reply_markup
params.description: A JSON-serialized object for an inline keyboard

methods.description: Use this method to get data for in-game high score tables. Will return the score of the specified user and several of their neighbors in a game.

params.name: user_id
params.description: Target user id

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target chat

params.name: message_id
params.description: Identifier of the sent message

params.name: inline_message_id
params.description: Identifier of the sent inline message

methods.description: Use this method to send a native poll. On success, the sent Message is returned.

params.name: business_connection_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message will be sent

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of a forum

params.name: question
params.description: Poll question, 1-300 characters

params.name: options
params.description: A JSON-serialized list of answer options, 2-10 strings 1-100 characters each

params.name: is_anonymous
params.description: True, if the poll needs to be anonymous, defaults to True

params.name: type
params.description: Poll type, 'quiz' or 'regular', defaults to 'regular'

params.name: allows_multiple_answers
params.description: True, if the poll allows multiple answers, ignored for polls in quiz mode

params.name: correct_option_ids
params.description: 0-based identifiers of the correct answer options, provided only for polls in quiz mode

params.name: explanation
params.description: Text that is shown when a user chooses an incorrect answer or taps on the lamp icon in a quiz-style poll

params.name: explanation_parse_mode
params.description: Mode for parsing entities in the explanation

params.name: explanation_entities
params.description: A JSON-serialized list of special entities that appear in the poll explanation

params.name: open_period
params.description: Amount of time the poll will be active after creation, in seconds

params.name: close_date
params.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the poll will be automatically closed

params.name: is_closed
params.description: Pass True if the poll needs to be immediately closed

params.name: disable_notification
params.description: Sends the message silently

params.name: protect_content
params.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

params.name: reply_parameters
params.description: Description of the message to reply to

params.name: reply_markup
params.type: InlineKeyboardMarkup or ReplyKeyboardMarkup or ReplyKeyboardRemove or ForceReply
params.description: Additional interface options

methods.description: Use this method to send an animated emoji that will display a random value. On success, the sent Message is returned.

params.name: business_connection_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message will be sent

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of a forum

params.name: emoji
params.description: Emoji on which the luck factor based. Currently, must be one of "🎲", "🎯", or "🎳"

params.name: disable_notification
params.description: Sends the message silently

params.name: protect_content
params.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

params.name: reply_parameters
params.description: Description of the message to reply to

params.name: reply_markup
params.type: InlineKeyboardMarkup or ReplyKeyboardMarkup or ReplyKeyboardRemove or ForceReply
params.description: Additional interface options

methods.description: Use this method to upload a file with a sticker for later use in createNewStickerSet and addStickerToSet methods. Returns the uploaded File on success.

params.name: user_id
params.description: A user that has rights to modify the bot

params.name: sticker
params.description: A file with the sticker in .WEBP, .PNG, .TGS, or .WEBM format

params.name: sticker_format
params.description: Format of the sticker, must be one of "static", "animated", "video"

methods.description: Use this method to create a new sticker set owned by a user. The bot will be able to edit the sticker set thus created. Returns True on success.

params.name: user_id
params.description: A user that has rights to modify the bot

params.name: name
params.description: Short name of sticker set, to be used in t.me/addstickers/{name} URLs

params.name: title
params.description: Sticker set title, 1-64 characters

params.name: stickers
params.description: A JSON-serialized list of 1-50 initial stickers to be added to the sticker set

params.name: sticker_type
params.description: Type of stickers in the set, pass "regular", "mask", or "custom_emoji"

params.name: needs_repainting
params.description: Pass True if stickers in the sticker set must be repainted to the color of text when used in messages

methods.description: Use this method to add a new sticker to a set created by the bot. Emoji sticker sets can have up to 200 stickers. Other sticker sets can have up to 120 stickers. Returns True on success.

params.name: user_id
params.description: A user that has rights to modify the bot

params.name: name
params.description: Sticker set name

params.name: sticker
params.description: A JSON-serialized object with information about the added sticker

methods.description: Use this method to move a sticker in a set created by the bot to a specific position. Returns True on success.

params.name: sticker
params.description: File identifier of the sticker

params.name: position
params.description: New sticker position in the set, zero-based

methods.description: Use this method to delete a sticker from a set created by the bot. Returns True on success.

params.name: sticker
params.description: File identifier of the sticker

methods.description: Use this method to replace an existing sticker in a sticker set with a new one. The method is equivalent to calling deleteStickerFromSet, then addStickerToSet, then setStickerPositionInSet. Returns True on success.

params.name: user_id
params.description: A user that has rights to modify the bot

params.name: name
params.description: Sticker set name

params.name: old_sticker
params.description: File identifier of the replaced sticker

params.name: sticker
params.description: A JSON-serialized object with information about the added sticker

methods.description: Use this method to get a sticker set. On success, a StickerSet object is returned.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the sticker set

methods.description: Use this method to delete a sticker set that was created by the bot. Returns True on success.

params.name: name
params.description: Sticker set name

methods.description: Use this method to set the thumbnail of a sticker set. Animated thumbnails can be set for animated sticker sets only. Video thumbnails can be set only for video sticker sets only. Returns True on success.

params.name: name
params.description: Sticker set name

params.name: user_id
params.description: A user that has rights to modify the bot

params.name: thumbnail
params.description: A .WEBP or .PNG image with the thumbnail, must be up to 128 kilobytes in size and have a width and height of exactly 100px

methods.description: Use this method to set the title of a sticker set created by the bot. Returns True on success.

params.name: name
params.description: Sticker set name

params.name: title
params.description: Sticker set title, 1-64 characters

methods.description: Use this method to change the list of emoji assigned to a regular or custom emoji sticker. The sticker must belong to a sticker set created by the bot. Returns True on success.

params.name: sticker
params.description: File identifier of the sticker

params.name: emoji_list
params.description: A JSON-serialized list of 1-20 emoji associated with the sticker

methods.description: Use this method to change search keywords assigned to a regular or custom emoji sticker. The sticker must belong to a sticker set created by the bot. Returns True on success.

params.name: sticker
params.description: File identifier of the sticker

params.name: keywords
params.description: A JSON-serialized list of 0-20 search keywords for the sticker with total length of up to 200 characters

methods.description: Use this method to change the mask position of a mask sticker. The sticker must belong to a sticker set that was created by the bot. Returns True on success.

params.name: sticker
params.description: File identifier of the sticker

params.name: mask_position
params.description: A JSON-serialized object with the position where the mask should be placed on faces

methods.description: Use this method to set the thumbnail of a custom emoji sticker set. Returns True on success.

params.name: name
params.description: Sticker set name

params.name: custom_emoji_id
params.description: Custom emoji identifier of a sticker from the sticker set; pass an empty string to remove the thumbnail

methods.description: Use this method to get information about custom emoji stickers by their identifiers. Returns an Array of Sticker objects.

params.name: custom_emoji_ids
params.description: A JSON-serialized list of custom emoji sticker identifiers

methods.description: Use this method to get custom emoji stickers, which can be used as a forum topic icon by any user. Requires no parameters. Returns an Array of Sticker objects.
Use this method to get up-to-date information about the chat. On success, a ChatFullInfo object is returned.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

methods.description: Use this method to get a list of administrators in a chat, which aren't bots. On success, returns an Array of ChatMember objects.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

methods.description: Use this method to get the number of members in a chat. Returns Int on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

methods.description: Use this method to get information about a member of a chat. The method is guaranteed to work only if the bot is an administrator in the chat. On success, returns a ChatMember object.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target user

methods.description: Use this method to change the title of a chat. Titles can't be changed for private chats. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: title
params.description: New chat title, 1-128 characters

methods.description: Use this method to change the description of a group, a supergroup or a channel. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: description
params.description: New chat description, 0-255 characters

methods.description: Use this method to change the photo of a chat. Photos can't be changed for private chats. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: photo
params.description: New chat photo, upload using multipart/form-data

methods.description: Use this method to delete a chat photo. Photos can't be deleted for private chats. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

methods.description: Use this method to change the bot's menu button in a private chat, or the default menu button. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target private chat

params.name: menu_button
params.description: A JSON-serialized object for the bot's new menu button

methods.description: Use this method to get the current value of the bot's menu button in a private chat, or the default menu button. Returns MenuButton on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target private chat

methods.description: Use this method to set default chat permissions for all members. The bot must be an administrator in the group or a supergroup for this to work and must have the can_restrict_members admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup

params.name: permissions
params.description: A JSON-serialized object for new default chat permissions

params.name: use_independent_chat_permissions
params.description: Pass True if chat permissions are set independently

methods.description: Use this method to restrict a user in a supergroup. The bot must be an administrator in the supergroup for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target user

params.name: permissions
params.description: A JSON-serialized object for new user permissions

params.name: use_independent_chat_permissions
params.description: Pass True if chat permissions are set independently

params.name: until_date
params.description: Date when restrictions will be lifted for the user; unix time

methods.description: Use this method to promote or demote a user in a supergroup or a channel. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target user

params.name: is_anonymous
params.description: Pass True if the administrator's presence in the chat is hidden

params.name: can_manage_chat
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can access the chat event log

params.name: can_delete_messages
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can delete messages of other users

params.name: can_manage_video_chats
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can manage video chats

params.name: can_restrict_members
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can restrict, ban or unban chat members

params.name: can_promote_members
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can add new administrators with a subset of their own privileges

params.name: can_change_info
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can change chat title, photo and other settings

params.name: can_invite_users
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can invite new users to the chat

params.name: can_post_stories
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can post stories in the channel

params.name: can_edit_stories
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can edit stories posted by other users

params.name: can_delete_stories
params.description: Pass True if the administrator can delete stories posted by other users

methods.description: Use this method to set a custom title for an administrator in a supergroup promoted by the bot. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target user

params.name: custom_title
params.description: New custom title for the administrator; 0-16 characters, emoji are not allowed

methods.description: Use this method to ban a user in a group, a supergroup or a channel. In the case of supergroups and channels, the user will not be able to return to the chat on their own using invite links, etc., unless unbanned first. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target user

params.name: until_date
params.description: Date when the user will be unbanned; unix time

params.name: revoke_messages
params.description: Pass True to delete all messages from the chat of the user that is being removed

methods.description: Use this method to unban a previously banned user in a supergroup or channel. The user will be able to return to the chat. The bot must be an administrator for this to work. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target user

params.name: only_if_banned
params.description: Do nothing if the user is not banned

methods.description: Use this method to ban a channel chat in a supergroup or a channel. Until the chat is unbanned, users will not be able to talk in the name of the banned channel chat in the supergroup or channel and all the forwarded messages from the banned chat will be deleted. The bot must be an administrator in the supergroup or channel for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: sender_chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target sender chat

methods.description: Use this method to unban a previously banned channel chat in a supergroup or a channel. The bot must be an administrator for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: sender_chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target sender chat

methods.description: Use this method to set a new group sticker set for a supergroup. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Use the field can_set_sticker_set optionally returned in getChat requests to check if the bot can use this method. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup

params.name: sticker_set_name
params.description: Name of the sticker set to be set as the group sticker set

methods.description: Use this method to delete a group sticker set from a supergroup. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Use the field can_set_sticker_set optionally returned in getChat requests to check if the bot can use this method. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup

methods.description: Use this method to set a custom tag for a user that previously held a specific position in a chat. For example, if you want to set a tag for a chat member that was a previous administrator, the new tag will be shown instead of the "Administrator" badge in the chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_members permission. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target user

params.name: custom_title
params.description: New custom title for the chat member; 0-16 characters, emoji are not allowed

methods.description: Use this method for your bot to leave a group, supergroup or channel. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

methods.description: Use this method to add a message to the list of pinned messages in a chat. If the chat is not a private chat, the bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the 'can_pin_messages' admin right in a supergroup or 'can_edit_messages' admin right in a channel. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target channel

params.name: message_id
params.description: Identifier of the message to pin

params.name: disable_notification
params.description: Pass True if it is not necessary to send a notification to all chat members about the new pinned message

methods.description: Use this method to remove a message from the list of pinned messages in a chat. If the chat is not a private chat, the bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the 'can_pin_messages' admin right in a supergroup or 'can_edit_messages' admin right in a channel. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target channel

params.name: message_id
params.description: Identifier of the message to unpin

methods.description: Use this method to clear the list of pinned messages in a chat. If the chat is not a private chat, the bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the 'can_pin_messages' admin right in a supergroup or 'can_edit_messages' admin right in a channel. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target channel

methods.description: Use this method to create an additional invite link for a chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. The link can be revoked using the method revokeChatInviteLink. Returns the new invite link as ChatInviteLink object.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: name
params.description: Invite link name; 0-32 characters

params.name: expire_date
params.description: Point in time when the link will expire; unix time

params.name: member_limit
params.description: The maximum number of users that can be members of the chat simultaneously after joining the chat via this invite link

params.name: creates_join_request
params.description: True if users joining the chat via the link need to be approved by chat administrators

methods.description: Use this method to edit a non-primary invite link created by the bot. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns the edited invite link as a ChatInviteLink object.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: invite_link
params.description: The invite link to edit

params.name: name
params.description: Invite link name; 0-32 characters

params.name: expire_date
params.description: Point in time when the link will expire; unix time

params.name: member_limit
params.description: The maximum number of users that can be members of the chat simultaneously after joining the chat via this invite link

params.name: creates_join_request
params.description: True if users joining the chat via the link need to be approved by chat administrators

methods.description: Use this method to revoke an invite link created by the bot. If the primary link is revoked, a new link is automatically generated. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns the revoked invite link as ChatInviteLink object.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: invite_link
params.description: The invite link to revoke

methods.description: Use this method to create a subscription invite link for a channel. The bot must be an administrator in the channel for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. The link can be edited and revoked using the methods editChatSubscriptionInviteLink and revokeChatInviteLink respectively. Returns the new subscription invite link as ChatInviteLink object.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target channel or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: subscription_period
params.description: The number of seconds the subscription will be active for before the next payment. The currency must be set to "XTR" (Telegram Stars) if the parameter is used.

params.name: name
params.description: Invite link name; 0-32 characters

params.name: expire_date
params.description: Point in time when the link will expire; unix time

methods.description: Use this method to edit a subscription invite link created by the bot. The bot must be an administrator in the channel for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns the edited subscription invite link as a ChatInviteLink object.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: invite_link
params.description: The subscription invite link to edit

params.name: name
params.description: Invite link name; 0-32 characters

params.name: expire_date
params.description: Point in time when the link will expire; unix time

methods.description: Use this method to generate a new primary invite link for a chat; any previously generated primary link is revoked. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate admin rights. Returns the new invite link as String on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

methods.description: Use this method to approve a chat join request. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_invite_users admin right. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the user that sent the join request

methods.description: Use this method to decline a chat join request. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_invite_users admin right. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup or channel

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the user that sent the join request

Chat Join Requests & Guest Mode.description: Methods for chat join requests & guest mode

methods.description: Use this method to respond to a join request. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_invite_users admin right. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_join_request_query_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the join request query to be responded to

params.name: approved
params.description: Pass True to approve the join request; the user will be able to join the chat. Pass False if the bot will send an explanation why it can't approve the request.

methods.description: Use this method to send a Web App result when the user presses an inline button calling your Web App. This will notify the user that you received their Web App data and close the Web App. Returns True on success.

params.name: web_app_query_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the query ID of the Web App query to be answered

params.name: result
params.description: An object describing the Web App to be opened

methods.description: Use this method to create a topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns information about the created topic as a ForumTopic object.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

params.name: name
params.description: Topic name, 1-128 characters

params.name: icon_color
params.description: Color of the topic icon in RGB format. Currently, must be one of 0x6FB92F, 0xFF7700, 0xFFB938, 0x00B4C4, 0x0052CC, 0x7700FF, 0xFF006E, 0xFF0000

params.name: icon_custom_emoji_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the custom emoji icon for the topic

methods.description: Use this method to edit name and icon of a topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread of the forum topic

params.name: name
params.description: New topic name, 0-128 characters. If not specified or empty, the current name is kept

params.name: icon_custom_emoji_id
params.description: New unique identifier of the custom emoji icon for the topic

methods.description: Use this method to close an open topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns True on success.

params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread of the forum topic

methods.description: Use this method to reopen a closed topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns True on success.

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread of the forum topic

params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread of the forum topic

params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread of the forum topic

params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

methods.description: Use this method to unhide the 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

methods.description: Use this method to close an open 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

methods.description: Use this method to reopen a closed 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

methods.description: Use this method to edit the name of the 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns True on success.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target forum supergroup

params.name: name
params.description: New topic name, 1-128 characters

methods.description: Use this method to change the list of the bot's commands. See the following link for more details about bot commands. Returns True on success.

params.name: commands
params.description: A JSON-serialized list of bot commands to be set as the list of the bot's commands

params.name: scope
params.description: An object, describing scope of users for which the commands are relevant

params.name: language_code
params.description: A two-letter ISO 639-1 language code

methods.description: Use this method to delete the list of the bot's commands for the given scope and language. After deletion, higher level commands will be shown to affected users. Returns True on success.

params.name: scope
params.description: An object, describing scope of users for which the commands are relevant

params.name: language_code
params.description: A two-letter ISO 639-1 language code

methods.description: Use this method to get the current list of the bot's commands for the given scope and language. Returns Array of BotCommand on success. If commands are not set and the default language is used, an empty list is returned.

params.name: scope
params.description: An object, describing scope of users for which the commands are relevant

params.name: language_code
params.description: A two-letter ISO 639-1 language code

methods.description: Use this method to send answers to an inline query. On success, True is returned.

params.name: inline_query_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the answered query

params.name: results
params.description: A JSON-serialized array of results for the inline query

params.name: cache_time
params.description: The maximum amount of time in seconds that the result of the inline query may be cached on the server

params.name: is_personal
params.description: Pass True if results may be cached on the server side only for the user that sent the query

params.name: next_offset
params.description: Pass the offset that a client should send in the next query with the same text to receive more results

params.name: button
params.description: A JSON-serialized object describing a button to be shown above inline query results

methods.description: Use this method to store a message that can be sent by a user of a Mini App. Returns True on success.

params.name: user_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the target user that can use the prepared message

params.name: result
params.description: An object describing the message to be sent

params.name: allow_user_chats
params.description: Pass True if the message can be sent to private chats with users

params.name: allow_bot_chats
params.description: Pass True if the message can be sent to private chats with bots

params.name: allow_group_chats
params.description: Pass True if the message can be sent to group and supergroup chats

params.name: allow_channel_chats
params.description: Pass True if the message can be sent to channel chats

methods.description: Use this method to send invoices. On success, the sent Message is returned.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target channel

params.name: title
params.description: Product name, 1-32 characters

params.name: description
params.description: Product description, 1-255 characters

params.name: payload
params.description: Bot-defined invoice payload, 1-128 bytes

params.name: provider_token
params.description: Payment provider token, obtained via @BotFather

params.name: currency
params.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code, see more on currencies

params.name: prices
params.description: Breakdown of prices

params.name: max_tip_amount
params.description: The maximum accepted amount for tips in the smallest units of the currency

params.name: suggested_tip_amounts
params.description: A JSON-serialized array of suggested amounts of tips in the smallest units of the currency

params.name: start_parameter
params.description: Unique deep-linking parameter

params.name: provider_data
params.description: JSON-serialized data about the invoice, which is useful for payment providers

params.name: photo_url
params.description: URL of the product photo for the invoice

params.name: photo_size
params.description: Photo size in bytes

params.name: photo_width
params.description: Photo width

params.name: photo_height
params.description: Photo height

params.name: need_name
params.description: Pass True if you require the user's full name to complete the order

params.name: need_phone_number
params.description: Pass True if you require the user's phone number to complete the order

params.name: need_email
params.description: Pass True if you require the user's email address to complete the order

params.name: need_shipping_address
params.description: Pass True if you require the user's shipping address to complete the order

params.name: send_phone_number_to_provider
params.description: Pass True if the user's phone number should be sent to provider

params.name: send_email_to_provider
params.description: Pass True if the user's email address should be sent to provider

params.name: is_flexible
params.description: Pass True if the final price depends on the shipping method

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread of the forum topic

params.name: disable_notification
params.description: Sends the message silently

params.name: protect_content
params.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

params.name: reply_parameters
params.description: Description of the message to reply to

params.name: reply_markup
params.description: A JSON-serialized object for an inline keyboard

methods.description: Returns the bot's Telegram Star transactions in chronological order. On success, returns a StarTransactions object.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of transactions to skip in the response

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of transactions to be retrieved. Values between 1-100 are accepted. Defaults to 100.

methods.description: A method to get the current Telegram Stars balance of the bot. Requires no parameters. On success, returns a StarAmount object.

params.description: Mode for parsing entities in the text

methods.description: Use this method to upload a file with a sticker for later use in createNewStickerSet and addStickerToSet methods. Returns the uploaded File on success.

params.name: user_id
params.description: A user that has rights to modify the bot

params.name: sticker
params.description: A file with the sticker in .WEBP, .PNG, .TGS, or .WEBM format

params.name: sticker_format
params.description: Format of the sticker, must be one of "static", "animated", "video"

methods.description: Use this method to send answers to callback queries sent from inline keyboards. The answer will be displayed to the user as a notification at the top of the chat screen or as an alert. On success, True is returned.

params.name: callback_query_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the query to be answered

params.name: text
params.description: Text of the notification. If not specified, nothing will be shown to the user, 0-200 characters.

params.name: show_alert
params.description: If True, an alert will be shown by the client instead of a notification at the top of the chat screen. Defaults to false.

params.name: url
params.description: URL that will be opened by the user's client

params.name: cache_time
params.description: The maximum amount of time in seconds that the result of the callback query may be cached client-side. Defaults to 0.

methods.description: Informs a user that some of the Telegram Passport elements they provided contains errors. The user will be unable to re-submit their Passport to you until the errors are resolved (the contents of the field for which you returned the error will be replaced with empty strings). Returns True on success.

params.name: user_id
params.description: User identifier

params.name: errors
params.description: A JSON-serialized array describing the errors
